minor.message: git -C pr-content fetch --unshallow is now redundant given fetch-depth:0 (harmless; defense-in-depth).
Bug D: in CI the FakeModelClient signs an approved:false report (fail-closed) — not surfaced prominently in the log; consider a ::warning:: (covered by operator-gated AC#7 runbook).

suggestion.message: set -o pipefail is also the runner default bash mode; idempotent + self-documenting, fine.

minor.message: Artifact handoff test compares the static prefix not the full template expression; add assert.equal(uploadName, downloadName).

suggestion.message: Pin the exact corrected download-artifact SHA in the test, not just any 40-char hex.

Document in the operator-facing runbook that the CI reviewer matrix is the fail-closed FakeModelClient (blocks all untrusted PRs, no real review) until a live InferenceProxy is wired. Fail-closed confirmed; no false-approval — documentation completeness only.
